title: Haworthia ikra

It belongs to the subfamily Asphodeloideae, which is a part of the order Asparagales. The plant is native to South Africa, where it grows in a specific type of environment. Haworthia ikra is further classified as a member of the subgenus Haworthia, within the genus Haworthia. Its classification as a distinct species within this genus helps in understanding its unique characteristics and growth habits.
